---
title-block-banner: true
toc: false
title: "2EARLY - patientinformation"
subtitle: "En side med information til dig der skal deltagelse i helbredsundersøgelsen"
---


## Her kan jeg skrive noget 


## Kontakt projektmedarbejder 

::: text-center
![Julie Støy](/images/julie_stoy2.webp){fig-alt="Image of Julie Støy" .profile-picture}
:::


## Table example

Here's a table:

| Name | Age |
|------|-----|
| John | 23  |
| Jane | 24  |

## Callout blocks

A [callout block](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/callouts.html):

::: callout
### Header within callout block
Some text inside a callout block. You can add any text you want here,
and it will be shown in a box.
:::

![](/images/midtlogo.png){fig-alt="regionmidt logo"}
